layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. BENTO grid for features. Asymmetrical layouts for testimonials.
layout_and_spacing.padding: p-12 to p-24 for main sections
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons

surface_strategies.glow_effects: Subtle inset shadows and blur-md behind borders for 'tracing beam' look.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary CTA: solid gold bg text-black font-semibold rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform. Secondary: glassmorphism, rounded-full.
components.cards: Glassmorphism with 1px border-white/10. No solid gray/muddy background. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and increased border glow (border-[#D4AF37]/30).
components.header: Fixed, Crystal Glass style: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050914]/60 border-b border-white/10 z-50
components.footer: Massive spacing (py-32), massive brand logo text (text-[8vw] Playfair Display font-light text-white/5).

media_and_images.description: Abstract curvy dark background to use as hero section background layer, with opacity (e.g., bg-black/60 overlay) to let the glowing curves shine through.
A close up 3D metallic object (sphere-like) for the 'Premium Sphere' hero or feature visual.
Dark blue gradient background for the Pricing or CTA section.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='pricing-plan-pro', data-testid='nav-link-features'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on dark blue/black backgrounds passes APCA requirements. Never use pure #000000; use #050914.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Playfair Display and Outfit.
Implement 'Lenis' for smooth scrolling (optional but highly recommended for luxury feel).
Hero Section: Full screen height (min-h-screen). Use 'hero_background' as the absolute positioned bg with object-cover and opacity-40, sitting behind a dark gradient overlay.

Sponsors/Logos Section: Use a slow, infinite marquee (e.g. framer-motion or react-fast-marquee) displaying the sponsor_logos. Apply grayscale/invert or heavy contrast if necessary to blend with dark mode.
Features Section: Use a Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A). Include asymmetric cards. One card can span 8 cols, another 4. Use the 'hero_sphere_object' in one of the tall cards.
Pricing: 3 tiers. Highlight the middle 'Premium' tier by making its card background lighter (bg-white/10) and adding a subtle golden inner glow via box-shadow.
Testimonials: Do NOT center-align the grid perfectly. Offset cards slightly or use a masonry-style layout.
Do NOT use raw Shadcn Card components if they feel too boxy; instead, wrap content in standard divs with the defined glassmorphism and padding classes (p-8 to p-12).
All components should be in .js/.jsx, NOT TypeScript.
